notes: 'alhamdulillah' = 'praise be to God / thank God', expression of gratitude or relief. Verbatim preservation chosen because the receiving partner is expected to recognize this common Indonesian-Muslim convention; literal 'thank God' flattens the religious-cultural register. No common multi-word variant (canonical Indonesian spelling is one-word). VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: whether 'thank God' or 'thanks be to God' is sometimes preferred in fully secular conversational contexts.
